W5-N.name: W5 lettino bebe 5-in-1
W5-N.description:
bebe letto con cradle
Questo pratico e versatile lettino 5-in-1 con culla e perfetto per stanze piccole. It has a built-in cradle (additionally paid) that gently rocks the bebe "side to side". La possibilita di smontare la culla consente di usare un lettino indipendente o un lettino con ruote. Grazie alle dimensioni compatte passa attraverso le porte e si sposta facilmente tra le stanze. Perfetto per bambini fino a 3 anni.

677.name: Small Basic bed mattress W2
677.description: Rucken Basic is a complete e proven materasso realizzato di high-quality T-25 elastic foam con medium H3 hardness. It will ensure undisturletto e peaceful sleep in comfortable conditions e the healthy development di your bebe from the first days di life.

732.name: Small Stabil bed mattress W2
732.description: Stabil is a materasso con durable e highly elastic latex in the central part, which perfectly adapts to the shape di the bebe's body. We managed to enhance the unique features di latex con excellent ventilation e the possibility di naturale latex disinfection in a home freezer. All thanks to the production process, which takes place on the most modern machines.

673.name: Small Aseptic crib mattress W2
673.description: A materasso con excellent antibatterico e antiallergic properties. Like our other materassoes, we realizzato it di highly elastic HR35 foam, but we did not add additional functional layers. Thanks to this, the antibatterico properties di the foam play the main role here, along con excellent e healthy support per the bebe.

DRESSER-NATURAL.name: Cassettiera
DRESSER-NATURAL.description:
A Cassettiera with
a height-adjustable changing table
Fronts e legs realizzato di solid beech legno.
2 deep drawers + 1 shallower drawer – perfect per 
cosmetics e diapers.
Handles can be mounted at any height e across 
the full width di the Cassettiera.
Adjustable changing table – 4 height levels, 
adjustable every 5 cm (up to 20 cm).
Option to mount the changing table on the right, 
left, or in the center di the Cassettiera.
Stable arched legs – harmoniously matching our cribs.

SLEEPBAG-0.5TOG-WHALE-WHITE-S.name: Sacco nanna 0,5 TOG Balena bianco S
SLEEPBAG-0.5TOG-WHALE-WHITE-S.description:
Dimensioni: 40x64 cm 
Made from certified OEKO-TEX 
Standard 100 materials.
Tessuto: 100% viscosa di bambu, 
weight: 170g/m².
Proprieta del tessuto in bambu: Ipoallergenico, 
antibatterico, antifungino, termoregolante,
 e highly absorbent. Effectively eliminates 
odors e garantisce comfort eccezionale
 – incredibilmente morbido e delicato al tatto.
Istruzioni per il lavaggio: Lavabile in lavatrice a 30°C.
Ideal per ensuring a safe 
and cozy sleep per babies 
while maintaining excellent 
breathability e moisture control.
